name: cheese-grok
description: Reader-first Cursor plugin for grokking unfamiliar codebases and authoring slop-free design docs. Bundles a four-pillar onboarding skill (Building Blocks → Entry Points → Infrastructure → Egress) with an adaptive Socratic quiz, an anti-slop design-doc workflow, and five reading probes. Includes a reader-companion always-on rule, a reader custom mode, and guardrail hooks.
author: paulnsorensen
